audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass allows up to 6 people to purchase discounted admission ($9.00/adult and $6.00/child) to the Stone Zoo or the Franklin Park Zoo. Library passes are good for daytime admission only, and not valid for Boston Lights or ZooLights.
